exceptions_requiring_owner_decision.evidence: recipes/views.py:164 calls (base_dir / 'content_prompts' / 'README.md').exists() at runtime to compute a 'done'/'pending' status badge on an internal roadmap/moderation dashboard. Archiving this file would silently flip that badge to 'pending' even though the underlying capability is unchanged. Not moved pending owner decision: either (a) update the view's check to a new canonical path once one exists, or (b) explicitly approve keeping this one file active outside the five-file allowlist as a machine-required exception.
